import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { HiCog, HiShieldCheck, HiLightningBolt, HiStar, HiArrowRight } from 'react-icons/hi'; const features = [ { icon: HiCog, title: 'Post Any Job', desc: 'Plumbing, electrical, carpentry — describe your repair and get matched instantly.' }, { icon: HiShieldCheck, title: 'Verified Technicians', desc: 'Every technician is vetted, rated, and reviewed by real homeowners.' }, { icon: HiLightningBolt, title: 'Real-Time Updates', desc: 'Get instant notifications when a technician accepts your job.' }, { icon: HiStar, title: 'Rate & Review', desc: 'Leave honest feedback after every completed job.' }, ]; const categories = ['Plumbing','Electrical','Carpentry','Painting','HVAC','Cleaning','Roofing','Landscaping']; const Landing = () => (
